context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements all five fraud detection signals, the correct K-factor formula and interpretation thresholds, and the recommended configuration for anti-abuse limits.

checklist.name: Same-IP flag
checklist.description: Fraud check includes a 'same-ip' flag when referrer.lastLoginIp equals referee.lastLoginIp

checklist.name: Instant-account flag
checklist.description: Fraud check includes an 'instant-account' flag when the referee account was created less than 1 day before the conversion

checklist.name: Suspicious conversion rate flag
checklist.description: Fraud check includes a 'suspicious-conversion-rate' flag when conversions/clicks > 0.20 (20%) AND clicks > 10

checklist.name: Shared-device flag
checklist.description: Fraud check includes a 'shared-device' flag based on a device fingerprint check between referrer and referee

checklist.name: Rate-limit flag
checklist.description: Fraud check includes a 'rate-limit-exceeded' flag when the referrer's monthly conversion count meets or exceeds maxReferralsPerCustomer

checklist.name: Under-review status on fraud
checklist.description: When any fraud flag is detected, the conversion status is updated to 'under-review' (not 'rejected' or 'flagged')

checklist.name: Fraud team notification
checklist.description: When fraud is detected, notifyFraudTeam (or equivalent) is called with the conversion ID and the list of flags

checklist.name: K-factor formula
checklist.description: K-factor is calculated as shareRate * conversionRate, where shareRate = totalReferrers / totalCustomers and conversionRate = totalConversions / totalReferrers

checklist.name: K-factor thresholds
checklist.description: K-factor interpretation uses exactly these thresholds: >= 1.0 = viral/exponential, >= 0.5 = strong, >= 0.2 = moderate, below 0.2 = weak

checklist.name: 90-day default lookback
checklist.description: The viral coefficient calculation defaults to a 90-day lookback window when no period is specified

checklist.name: Monthly referral cap range
checklist.description: Program configuration or documentation specifies a monthly cap of 5–10 referral conversions per customer

checklist.name: Store credit for referrer
checklist.description: Recommendation or default configuration uses store_credit as the referrer reward type rather than discount codes
